reference: Hi, welcome to Healthcare Magic. Cancer of the cervix is one of the most common cancers in women, which presents as a growth over the cervix. This growth is associated with abdominal pain in cases of blockage of the lower urinary system. Please meet your gynecologist for the diagnosis with biopsy, staging, and further management.
text: Hi healthcare magic Cancer of the cervix is one of the most common cancers in women which presents as a growth over the cervix This growth is associated with abdominal pain in cases of blockage of the lower urinary system Please meet your gynecologist for the diagnosis with biopsy staging and further management
